profile.name: Caio Balieiro Mariano
profile.title: Junior Full Stack Developer
profile.summary: Junior Full Stack Developer with real production experience using Node.js, TypeScript, React, Fastify, PostgreSQL/MySQL, and AWS. Worked as the lead architect on an end-to-end freelance project and in an automotive fintech building WhatsApp payment chatbots, REST APIs, and back offices. QA background with E2E automation (Playwright) in Web3 and government systems.

experience.title: Lumen Foundation | Full Stack Developer & Technical Architect | Freelancer | Feb/2026 – Present
experience.context: Web platform for a social foundation supporting children in Mozambique. Sole technical owner, defining the stack, data modeling, security, and development workflow.
bullets: Defined the full system architecture (React/Vite/TypeScript + Fastify/Drizzle/MySQL), data modeling, local Docker setup, and infrastructure strategy.
Built full stack features: JWT authentication, donor area, one-time and recurring donation flows, admin dashboard, volunteer management, and reports.
Implemented TDD with Jest covering business rules and security; integrated Asaas (PIX/boleto/card), Resend, and observability with OpenTelemetry/Jaeger/Metabase.
Structured an AI-assisted development workflow with agents, custom commands, and a complete delivery cycle (planning → PR) with mandatory human review.

experience.title: InfinityBase | Junior Full Stack Developer | Oct/2025 – May/2026
experience.context: Worked across two ecosystems: automotive fintech (CarroPago/Renave) with modern TypeScript and a government platform (Bauhaus) with legacy JavaScript.
bullets: Developed and maintained REST APIs across two code generations (Bun + Clean Architecture and legacy Express) distributed across 3 PostgreSQL databases, with universal soft delete and migrations.
Worked on WhatsApp payment chatbots (AWS Lambda + Lex + Twilio) with Redis session state and BullMQ asynchronous workers that match PIX confirmations with active sessions.
Implemented features in the multi-tenant back office (AWS ECS Fargate): integrator registration with CNPJ validation, API key delivery by email, and N+1 Excel export refactoring.

Refactored PDF generation in the government ecosystem from a synchronous Lambda (~1 min) to an asynchronous Lambda + S3 flow (~10 sec), with no size limit; implemented offline-first behavior with PWA + Dexie.js (IndexedDB).
Investigated end-to-end bugs in distributed environments (Twilio → Lex → Lambda → API → external integrations) using CloudWatch, database dumps, and tracing with OpenTelemetry/AWS X-Ray.

experience.title: InfinityBase | QA Analyst | Mar/2025 – Oct/2025
experience.context: QA role focused on E2E automation in Web3 projects and government systems.
bullets: Implemented E2E tests with Playwright (JS/TS) in the Ambiental and Bako ID projects, covering Web3 flows on Fuel Blockchain and government systems.
Integrated automations into CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions; documented and structured test cases in ClickUp.

projects.title: Database Benchmark (Final Paper) — JavaScript, Docker, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, CockroachDB, Redis
projects.context: Performance comparison project across SQL, NoSQL, NewSQL, and In-Memory databases.
bullets: Compared SQL, NoSQL, NewSQL, and In-Memory database performance (PostgreSQL, CockroachDB, MongoDB, Redis) in an isolated Docker Compose environment, measuring latency, TPS, and resource usage.

projects.title: Todo List Monorepo — NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, JWT, React, TanStack Router, TailwindCSS, Turborepo
projects.context: Full stack monorepo application built as a technical challenge during the QA → Developer transition.
bullets: Developed a NestJS API with JWT authentication and a React frontend with type-safe TanStack Router, Dockerized with ESLint/Husky standards.

education.title: FATEC Guaratinguetá — Systems Analysis and Development (Technologist) | Feb/2023 – Feb/2026
details: Certifications: Cisco Networking Academy — Networking Basics (Jul/2025) | IT Essentials (Jun/2023)
